name: Orb Weaver Jr.
description: The Orb Weaver Jr. is the smaller, quicker version of the adult orb weaver. It is still a real early-game problem, especially when it appears around larger nests or alongside bigger spiders.
behavior: It moves quickly, rarely strays far from its webs, and usually stays inside the adult nest radius. It alternates between short patrols and tiny pauses, always ready to re-engage.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile on sight and usually rushes in to close distance immediately. When paired with other spiders, it makes the encounter far more dangerous than its size suggests because it constantly steals space and attention.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually stays near the nest and reacts if a nearby orb weaver enters combat. Outside that radius it rarely goes looking for long fights on its own.
strategy: It does not have much health, so deleting it early before focusing on larger threats is almost always worth it. Never leave it behind you for free; the post-bite windows are enough to remove it if you read them well.
